name: iread
description: Create, resume, inspect, and read local iRead research subscriptions.

interface.shortDescription: Configure and operate local research subscriptions.
interface.longDescription: Expand and approve multiple research domains, execute governed local workflows, resume collection and authorization, inspect source coverage, validate outcomes, learn from feedback, and read local reports.
defaultPrompt: 用 iRead 同时订阅我关心的多个专业领域
检查我的 iRead 信源清单及代表作
打开并总结我最新的 iRead 日报
